Little Artists Laing Art Gallery 9 Mar, 13 Mar, 16 Mar, 20 Mar, 23 Mar, 27 Mar, 30 Mar Interactive art sessions for 1-5 year olds with a different theme each week.
Mother's Day Afternoon Tea Laing Art Gallery 14 Mar Treat a mum in your life to a delightful afternoon tea experience.
Herbert Smith Freehills Kramer Portrait Award 2025 and Exploring Identity Laing Art Gallery 28 Mar - 5 Sep Explore the history of portraiture from the 16th century to the present day.
Sublime Landscapes Laing Art Gallery Until 5 Dec Landscape watercolours and prints from the Laing Art Gallery’s collection.
Picture of the month Laing Art Gallery Until 31 Dec Join us for a talk from the Friends of the Laing
Afternoon Tea: Pre-book Laing Art Gallery Until 2 Jan 2027 Treat yourself to a delightful afternoon tea experience at the stunning Laing Art Gallery.
Northern Spirit Laing Art Gallery Permanent Celebrating artists, manufacturers and makers from North East England.
100 Years of Collecting Laing Art Gallery Permanent A long-term display of paintings and objects from the Laing's collection, from the 15th century to the present day.
The Pursuit of Beauty Laing Art Gallery Permanent A new display highlighting key pieces from the decorative arts collections.
Tactile artworks and alternative interpretation Laing Art Gallery Permanent The gallery has a number of tactile artworks and a painting which is brought to life in a sound and light display.
Playspace Laing Art Gallery Permanent Our free circus-themed Playspace is especially for our youngest visitors, where they can play and explore our den.
Chris Killip: The Last Ships Laing Art Gallery Permanent Photography exhibition documenting the rise and fall of the shipbuilding trade in the North East of England in the 1970s

Now showing Marshmallow Laser Feast: Of the Oak Sat 6 Dec 2025 – Sun 15 Mar 2026 This winter, step into the Chapel to discover Of the Oak, an immersive sound and video experience by internationally acclaimed artist collective Marshmallow Laser Feast.
Now showing William Kentridge: The Pull of Gravity Sat 28 Jun 2025 – Sun 19 Apr 2026 A must-see exhibition featuring new sculptures by the celebrated South African artist.

Now showing MADE Mon 13 Oct 2025 – Sun 5 Apr 2026 MADE is YSP Shop's changing programme of contemporary craft and jewellery, which showcases the work of established and up-and-coming artists, designers and makers.
Now showing Louise Lockhart: Cake Crumbs and Lemonade Sat 7 Mar – Sun 2 Aug 2026 Cake Crumbs and Lemonade will be the largest solo exhibition to date by illustrator Louise Lockhart.
Upcoming LR Vandy: Rise Sat 14 Mar – Sun 13 Sept 2026 Rise is an ambitious first solo museum exhibition by LR Vandy, created for The Weston Gallery
Upcoming Nicola Turner: Time’s Scythe Sat 28 Mar – Sun 27 Sept 2026 Time’s Scythe is a brand-new installation by British artist Nicola Turner that breathes new life into the 18th-century Chapel.

Upcoming YSP MADE x Design-Nation Showcase Tue 21 Apr – Sun 18 Oct 2026 YSP continues its mission to support independent makers with the biannual MADE showcase, in collaboration with Design-Nation for Spring 2026.
Upcoming Thabo Mkwananzi: UMFECE Summer 2026 Huddersfield-based musician and artist Thabo Mkwananzi will create a new participatory project inspired by Bantutronic philosophy for YSP in 2026.

Upcoming Hold to this Earth: Works by Contemporary Indigenous North American Artists from Tia Collection Sat 13 Jun 2026 – Sun 18 Apr 2027 Headlining our 2026 programme is a major presentation of work by contemporary Indigenous American artists from Tia Collection.

Upcoming Jakob Rowlinson: ROTATOR From 18 July 2026 Jakob Rowlinson will present three large-scale leather sculptures that act as guardians of the threshold between indoors and outdoors at YSP Centre.

Upcoming Annie Montgomerie: Missies and Nippers Sat 15 Aug – Sun 1 Nov 2026 Following her sell-out show Hand Me Downs in 2022, Annie Montgomerie will be back next summer with a new exhibition Missies and Nippers.
Upcoming Jim Ever Fri 28 – Mon 31 Aug 2026 Following a two week residency, Yorkshire Graduate Award 2025 recipient Jim Ever presents a brand new exhibition inspired by the YSP landscape.

Upcoming Angela Harding: A Chronicle of Birds and Beasts Sat 14 Nov 2026 – Sun 28 Feb 2027 Ten years after Angela Harding's first exhibition at YSP, we are thrilled to be welcoming her back in winter 2026.
